description_long: This object is a large, arcade-style machine featuring a built-in seat and a prominent upright cabinet. The front displays a wide screen with a marquee above, and a control panel with buttons and a steering wheel, suggesting it is designed for interactive entertainment. The sides are decorated with bold, graphic designs and the word 'ARCADE' in large letters, while the back is plain and unadorned. The seat is molded and padded, attached to a platform that extends from the base of the cabinet. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal and plastic, with some electronic components inside. The object is substantial in size, likely intended for stationary placement in public or recreational urban environments.
description: A large, arcade-style entertainment machine with a built-in seat, upright cabinet, and bold graphic side panels. It features a screen, control panel, and steering wheel for interactive use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the screen, marquee, control panel, and attached seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bold 'ARCADE' graphic and the profile of the seat and steering wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view is plain and unadorned, showing the back of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with the 'ARCADE' graphic and seat profile visible.
